data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the next-eligible-delivery timestamp.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the next-eligible-delivery timestamp to enforce cool-down, which is a specific need outlined in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence or checks related to this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status. The lack of concrete API reads or persisted state checks means that the requirement cannot be confirmed or denied based on the available information.
gaps: Next-eligible-delivery timestamp validation is not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the next-eligible-delivery timestamp requirement.
